name: Pace Medical, Inc.
summary: Pace Medical, Inc. designs and markets cardiac pacing products for medical professions in the United States and internationally. The company offers Model 4580 MICRO-PACE, a programmable and dual-chamber temporary cardiac pacemaker for multi-mode and multi-parameter operation; Model EV4543, a single-chamber temporary cardiac pacemaker that is designed to provide acute therapeutic, prophylactic, and diagnostic pacing support; and The Bedside Model 4170, a single-chamber temporary cardiac pacemaker. It also provides REF 4800 pacing analyzer, an internally powered and software-programmable device designed for continuous operation in the acute cardiac-care environment as temporary cardiac pacemaker and a pacing analyzer; and autoclavable and single-use surgical/patient extension cables and adapters. The company was founded in 1985 and is based in San Diego, California.
